branding.title: Logo and Branding
branding.logoDescription: The logo will appear on your quotes and invoices.
branding.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP

numbering.title: Document Numbering
numbering.warning: The next number is applied to the next document you create. Lowering it below an already-used number can create duplicate numbers. Change with care.

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.autoPrintReceipt: Automatically print receipt after each sale
pos.showStockWarning: Show a warning when stock is low

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: Configure the stamp duty (droit de timbre) applied to cash payments for tax reporting.
taxes.stampDutyEnabled: Apply stamp duty on cash payments

dashboardCustomization.title: Dashboard Layout
dashboardCustomization.description: Choose which stat cards appear on your dashboard and reorder them. Saved on this device.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.legalMentionsPlaceholder: Legal mentions to display on documents...
legal.legalMentionsHint: These mentions will appear at the bottom of your documents

messages.deleteLogoConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the logo?

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.exportDescription: Download a full backup of your data. Encrypted backups are protected with AES-256 encryption.
backup.includePhotosHint: Photos make the backup much larger. Leave this off unless you need them restored.
backup.exportEncryptedHint: Only the encrypted export includes user accounts' passwords, so deleted users can be fully restored. A restore never changes an existing user's password.
backup.passwordRequired: Password is required for encrypted backups
backup.importFailed: Failed to import backup. Check your password.
backup.importDescription: Select an encrypted .enc backup file and enter the password used during export.
backup.importConfirmMessage: This will replace all your existing data. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the key manually.
twoFactor.verifyCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
twoFactor.backupCodesDescription: Save these codes in a safe place. Each can only be used once.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: Are you sure? This will log you out of all other devices.
